stemHtml: How do pneumatic de-icing boots fitted to the leading edge of a wing operate?

options.a: Engine oil is released through a porous leading-edge surface to prevent ice formation.
options.b: Compressed engine bleed air is supplied to the boots on a timed cycle to remove ice.
options.c: Hot air is continuously supplied to the leading edge to melt ice as it forms.
options.d: Electrical heating elements automatically activate the system whenever OAT is below 0°C.
